name: roadmapsmith
description: One-command roadmap generation and maintenance for coding agents, with a shared native slash bundle for Claude and Codex plus the RoadmapSmith CLI.

install.notes: Recommended Claude Code install path for native GUI slash commands. Canonical surfaces: /roadmap, /roadmap-zero, /roadmap-maintain, /roadmap-status, /roadmap-validate, /roadmap-update, /roadmap-setup. The public CLI update family covers both checklist refresh and verified single-task completion; sync remains the advanced alias for the mutating refresh path. Advanced surfaces: /roadmap-init, /roadmap-generate, /roadmap-audit. DEPRECATED: /roadmap-sync remains only as a compatibility root for existing automation; use /roadmap-maintain or /roadmap-update for new workflows. Install the roadmapsmith CLI separately for actual command execution; roadmapsmith status is the public readiness command and roadmapsmith doctor remains a compatibility alias. Then run /reload-skills and, if applicable, /reload-plugins. Codex native plugin installs use the repo/package .codex-plugin surface instead of this Claude-specific skills CLI path.

skills.name: roadmap
skills.description: Native slash palette for RoadmapSmith commands and recommended entrypoints across supported hosts.

skills.name: roadmap-zero
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for the one-command Zero Mode CLI workflow.

skills.name: roadmap-maintain
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for the preserve-first generate + sync + audit flow.

skills.name: roadmap-status
skills.description: Native slash readiness check grounded in roadmapsmith status JSON.

skills.name: roadmap-init
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for creating ROADMAP.md and AGENTS.md.

skills.name: roadmap-generate
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for managed roadmap updates that require --full-regen before destructive replacement.

skills.name: roadmap-validate
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for evidence-backed roadmap validation.

skills.name: roadmap-update
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for evidence-backed sync and verified single-task completion.

skills.name: roadmap-sync
skills.description: DEPRECATED legacy compatibility root; use roadmap-maintain or roadmap-update.

skills.name: roadmap-audit
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for the advanced sync-plus-audit mutating summary workflow.

skills.name: roadmap-setup
skills.description: Native slash entrypoint for generating RoadmapSmith host integration files.
